FluentGpu
Table of Contents

Struct InputEvent

Namespace
FluentGpu.Pal
Assembly
FluentGpu.Pal.dll

POD input event drained from the host-owned ring once per frame (no C# events across the seam). ScrollDelta (Wheel only) is in DIP, oriented so positive = scroll toward the content end (offset increases). The platform pump converts WM_MOUSEWHEEL notches → DIP and flips the sign there. Button: 0 = left, 1 = right, 2 = middle. Mods is the modifier chord at the time of the event (pump-captured); IsRepeat = keyboard auto-repeat (lParam bit 30); TimestampMs = the platform message time (drives double/triple-click detection in the dispatcher).

public readonly record struct InputEvent : IEquatable<InputEvent>
Implements
IEquatable<InputEvent>
Inherited Members
ValueType.Equals(object)
ValueType.GetHashCode()
ValueType.ToString()
object.Equals(object, object)
object.GetType()
object.ReferenceEquals(object, object)

Constructors

InputEvent(InputKind, Point2, int, int, float, KeyModifiers, PointerKind, bool, uint)

POD input event drained from the host-owned ring once per frame (no C# events across the seam). ScrollDelta (Wheel only) is in DIP, oriented so positive = scroll toward the content end (offset increases). The platform pump converts WM_MOUSEWHEEL notches → DIP and flips the sign there. Button: 0 = left, 1 = right, 2 = middle. Mods is the modifier chord at the time of the event (pump-captured); IsRepeat = keyboard auto-repeat (lParam bit 30); TimestampMs = the platform message time (drives double/triple-click detection in the dispatcher).

public InputEvent(InputKind Kind, Point2 PositionPx, int Button, int KeyCode, float ScrollDelta = 0, KeyModifiers Mods = KeyModifiers.None, PointerKind Pointer = PointerKind.Mouse, bool IsRepeat = false, uint TimestampMs = 0)

Parameters

Kind InputKind
PositionPx Point2
Button int
KeyCode int
ScrollDelta float
Mods KeyModifiers
Pointer PointerKind
IsRepeat bool
TimestampMs uint

TimestampMs

FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
